sourceSwitcher.label: Doc source
sourceSwitcher.description: Switch between shared team docs and your private docs.

personal.title: My docs
personal.subtitle: {count} personal docs
personal.emptyDescription: Create your first document to start capturing ideas.

team.title: Team docs
team.subtitle: {count} team docs
team.emptyDescription: Create the first team document and collaborate with your team.

teamPersonal.title: My work docs
teamPersonal.subtitle: {count} personal work docs
teamPersonal.newDocDescription: Create a new personal work doc
teamPersonal.emptyDescription: Create a personal doc inside the team workspace that only you can access.

welcome.title: Welcome to docs
welcome.emptyDescription: There are no docs yet. Click the + button in the sidebar to create one.
welcome.selectDescription: Choose a document on the left to start editing.

sidebar.title: Docs
sidebar.emptyDescription: Click the + button above to create one

deleteDialog.title: Delete document?
deleteDialog.description: This will delete “{title}”. {children} This action cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.children: Its child documents will be deleted too.

blocknote.conflict: A remote change was detected. Your local draft has been preserved.
blocknote.conflictStatus: Conflict detected. Your local draft has been preserved.
blocknote.errorStatus: Save failed. Your local draft has been preserved locally.
blocknote.shortcut: Press {key} + S to save • Auto-saves every 30 seconds

folderIntro.saveFailed: Failed to save the folder description.
folderIntro.title: Folder description
folderIntro.emptyEditable: Click to add a folder description...
folderIntro.tip1: This is a folder used to organize and categorize documents.
folderIntro.tip2: Right-click the folder to create child documents or child folders.
folderIntro.tip3: You can add detailed guidance and usage notes here.

context.docNotReady: The document does not exist or has not finished loading yet.
